text:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) was established in 1935.
The 20th century spans from 1901 to 2000.
To determine the decade, we look at the first two digits of the year. In 1935, the first two digits are 19.
The decades of the 20th century are:
1900s (1900-1909)
1910s (1910-1919)
1920s (1920-1929)
1930s (1930-1939)
1940s (1940-1949)
... and so on.
Since 1935 falls between 1930 and 1939, it belongs to the 1930s decade.

FINAL ANSWER: 1930s
